params.owner: The initial owner of the agent account.
params.salt: A unique salt for deterministic deployment.

createAccount(address,uint256).notice: Deploy a new AgentRootAccount proxy, or return the existing one if already deployed.

delegationManager().notice: The DelegationManager address set on every new account.

getAddress(address,uint256).notice: Compute the counterfactual address of an agent account.

serverSigner().notice: The server signer added as co-owner on every new account.         This allows the server to sign delegations on behalf of user accounts.

setDelegationManager(address).notice: Update the DelegationManager for future deployments.

setServerSigner(address).notice: Update the server signer for future deployments.
